classifieds_178.POSSIBLE REASONS FOR FAILURE:
1.  The search parameters (keyword "white guitar" and category "Music instruments") were not consistently maintained. Clicking on a location from the "All locations" list on the homepage reset the previously applied keyword and category filters.
2.  After selecting a location (West Virginia or Delaware), the "Music instruments" category was not re-applied, leading to search results that included items from other categories.
3.  The agent incorrectly identified a "blond" guitar as "white", failing to meet the specific color requirement of the objective.
classifieds_178.REFLECTION: For future attempts, ensure all search parameters (keyword, category, and location) are applied and maintained throughout the search process. If selecting a location resets other filters, re-apply the keyword and category filters before performing the search. Always carefully verify the item's description and image to confirm it matches all criteria, especially specific attributes like color ("white guitar").
